tagline: AI THAT THINKS. CODE THAT SHIPS.
description: AI Engineer & Machine Learning Student passionate about building intelligent applications, autonomous agent systems, and RAG architectures.

roles.detailed: AI Engineer • Machine Learning Student • Full Stack Developer

bio: I'm a Computer Science & Machine Learning student at NSRIT, passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Agentic AI Systems, and Full-Stack Development. I enjoy building intelligent applications, autonomous AI agents, RAG systems, and modern web experiences that solve real-world problems.

bullets: Building AI-powered applications, RAG systems, multi-agent architectures, and full-stack web platforms using Python, FastAPI, React, and modern AI frameworks.
Developing intelligent tools and autonomous agent workflows to automate repetitive tasks and solve complex reasoning problems.
Integrating vector databases (Chroma, PGVector) with embedding models for efficient semantic search and knowledge retrieval.
Designing and styling responsive web frontends with clean modern aesthetics, glassmorphism, and performance optimization.
experience.desc: Building AI applications, RAG pipelines, agentic workflows, and full-stack platforms.

bullets: Contributing to open-source AI and machine learning repositories on GitHub, maintaining high code quality and test coverage.
Collaborating with global developers to resolve bugs, implement features, and improve project documentation.
Reviewing pull requests and code modifications, validating alignment with project best practices.
experience.desc: Contributing to open-source repositories and collaborating on AI/ML and software engineering projects.

bullets: Exploring LLM fine-tuning, retrieval techniques, agentic frameworks, and local LLM deployment using Ollama and open-source models.
Researching multi-agent debate protocols, autonomous reasoning paths, and evaluation frameworks for AI system safety.
Studying machine learning architectures, neural networks, computer vision, and predictive model training.
experience.desc: Independent research into LLMs, Vector Databases, RAG, Ollama, and Machine Learning algorithms.
